text:
I feel as though I am standing at the threshold of institutional knowledge—a sterile corridor gives way to a modern room, yet an air of anticipation fills me. The reflective glass surfaces and carefully arranged spaces invite contemplation: what decisions were made here, what thoughts shared?

As I move forward to the vibrant wall of the exhibition, "R + D" stares at me, bold and inviting. The wall celebrates research and development, and I am pulled into the narrative of progress and collaboration. The colorful, textured graphics speak of innovation; the glowing screens and open books draw me to ponder the merging of human creativity and technological evolution. Amid impersonal order, I feel a seed of curiosity growing—an urge to reflect on how my own story interacts with this ever-advancing human endeavor.
